security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://api.maptiler.com; media-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://*.proton.me https://api.maptiler.com https://api.github.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-src https://*.proton.me

bundle.shortDescription: Proton Photos albums as map timelines
bundle.longDescription: A private view of Proton Photos albums: decrypts locally in the app and lays the geotagged photos out on a map as a timeline of stops.
